note: Explorer price-cards: add XAUT/BTC and PAXG/BTC charts below the existing USD price charts. Same card format, same colors (gold for XAUT, green for PAXG), same canvas size, same 1H..5Y timeframe buttons, same default 24H. Same CoinGecko market_chart endpoint with vs_currency=btc. Separate cache namespace via ":btc" suffix on the CoinGecko id key; USD-side logic untouched (SOST PoPC reference-price calculation still reads cache ["tether-gold"][1] / cache["pax-gold"][1] for USD). BTC values formatted with the bitcoin sign and 6-8 decimals. Initial fan-out fetches the BTC market_chart for both gold coins on page load and renders the spot price + chart + tooltip immediately. New cards are placed in a second 3-column grid row under the USD row, with the third slot empty to preserve the exact card width of the row above. No consensus / scripts / src changes.
